description: A screen-capture from a U.S. Senate floor video feed (C-SPAN-style). The image shows the ornate Senate chamber from the gallery: rows of wooden desks on blue carpet, the presiding officer's marble dais beneath the 'E PLURIBUS UNUM' eagle frieze, and dozens of senators standing, milling, and applauding around the floor. A lower-third graphic overlay in the Senate's official style sits at the bottom: the gold U.S. Senate seal at left, a blue banner reading the vote tally 'Yea 54 Nay 45,' and below it 'Nomination of Markwayne Mullin, of Oklahoma, to be Secretary of Homeland Security.' Aside from the standard broadcast chyron, there is no custom graphic design, so this is a video screenshot rather than a designed meme. It was retweeted from RapidResponse47 to confirm the Senate's confirmation vote installing Markwayne Mullin as the ninth Secretary of Homeland Security, documenting the official action for a news-following audience.
notable_text: Yea 54 Nay 45 | Nomination of Markwayne Mullin, of Oklahoma, to be Secretary of Homeland Security
